text_jp:
奴のあの姿…邪悪な心…
あえて呼ぶなら…邪眼{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: その邪眼が、５万年前の世紀王だと{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp:
そうです。邪眼は世紀王から、闇の
支配者…創世王になるのが目的なんです{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: この変異空間も邪眼のしわざか…{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp:
邪眼は創世王になったら、
人類を滅ぼすつもりです！{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: 何とかして奴の復活を止めないと！{END}
text_en: What is going on here?{END}

text_jp: 復活…それに必要なものは…実体！？{END}
text_en: What is going on here?{END}

text_jp:
うむ…皆の時代に不気味な生物の入った
カプセルは無かったか？{END}
text_en: What is going on here?{END}

text_jp: ありました！中に巨大な生物が…{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp:
…やはりそうか、この時間軸を使って
成長させているな{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: あの生物は一体…{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp:
…おそらく邪眼は
まだ精神エネルギーの状態だ{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: そして、あの生物は…その受け皿{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: あれが…邪眼の肉体！{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: 奴に実体を持たせない方法はただ１つ{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: それは？{END}
text_en: What is going on here?{END}

text_jp: 俺がこの時代のカプセルを破壊する{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: この空間の時間軸で成長しているなら{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp:
それで全時代のカプセルが
消滅するはずだ{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: …邪眼の復活を…止められる{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp:
皆は、自分の時代のカプセルが
消滅するか確認してくれ{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: 了解！{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}

text_jp: またここで落ち合おう{END}
text_en: We have to stop them here.{END}
